task_params.title: Visual Budgeting Workshop Outline
outline_points: Welcome and short intro to budgeting
Explain income, fixed costs, and flexible spending visually
Use color blocks or simple charts for monthly categories
Include a hands-on activity building one sample budget
Leave time for questions and local resource sharing
